metadata.description: Claude Code plugins by inkwonjung-colosseum: productivity, documentation, and developer tools.

plugins.name: confluence-export-kit
plugins.description: Claude Code plugin for Confluence export and local export-index workflows: auth/default setup, page, space, org, page-with-descendants export, automatic post-export indexing, and local Markdown indexing.

plugins.name: planning-team-kit
plugins.description: Claude Code and Codex compatible planning kit that reads local Confluence exports, generates planning drafts, reviews them, and publishes confirmed updates to Confluence.

plugins.name: diagram-design
plugins.description: Editorial-quality technical and product diagrams rendered as standalone HTML with inline SVG and skinnable brand-aware styling.
